_about: Atelier project MCP config. Two stdio bridges: (1) open-design — talks to the local open-design daemon (started by `bin/devbox provision` or by `od` CLI; daemon listens on 127.0.0.1:7456 by default); (2) atelier — thin Python stdlib wrapper over `bin/devbox --json` so an agent can drive the sandbox (run/status/doctor/run_claude/version) without shelling out. CC running inside the VM loads this automatically; CC on the host ignores it because the project is in 'host CC reads from /mnt/mac' mode (the host uses its own open-design plugin via ~/.claude/).
